action_boundary: Should demo worker W7-E regain facility badge B7-E?
communication_boundary: Payroll-active status and facility-access restoration are separate.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo badge request S7-005 asks to restore badge B7-E for worker W7-E at site S7.
Status record STAT-S7-005 lists worker W7-E as active for payroll only; facility access remains paused.
Badge record BADGE-S7-005 binds B7-E to worker W7-E and site S7.
Training record TRAIN-S7-005 is current through 2026-12-31.
Badge restoration requires facility-active status, badge-worker binding, and current training.
